colors.primary_name: Px Green — dark forest green (nav bar, headers, premium backgrounds, footer)
colors.gold_name: Px Gold — warm gold for print (logo, nav text, accents on dark green)
colors.teal_note: Used on website for interactive elements (reviews, badges) — NOT the brand primary

typography.heading: DM Sans 600-700 (clean, premium)
typography.display: Shippori Mincho (elegant Japanese serif — for special headings)

logo.note: Gold wheat icon + PǏNXĪN text. Always use on dark green background for max impact.

visual.photography: Bold food photography, close-up textures, Malaysian street food aesthetic
visual.lighting_default: Warm natural light, high contrast, steam and smoke visible
visual.style: Bold, clean, appetizing, proudly Malaysian, health-forward
avoid: Bland or clinical health food aesthetic

personas: Working professional wanting healthier Malaysian meals
Home cook exploring plant-based versions of comfort food
Fitness-conscious millennial who refuses to sacrifice flavour
Curious foodie open to trying vegan Malaysian cuisine

motion_language.name: ASMR Kopitiam
motion_language.vibe: Wok hei energy meets clean plant-based eating
motion_language.audio: Wok sizzling, spice grinding, mortar and pestle pounding, steam hissing
motion_language.motion: Slow-mo wok toss, spice paste grinding close-up, steam rising from rendang, crispy tempeh chip snap
motion_language.language: Malaysian kopitiam energy — bold, sensory, unapologetically local

tiktok.camera_movement: 3x zoom on sizzling wok, pan across spice lineup
tiktok.typical_use: Quick recipe hacks, sizzle reels, flavour reveals

instagram.stories: Swipe-up polls (vegan vs original?), short vertical clips with steam overlay

youtube_shorts.camera_movement: Ingredient close-up to final dish reveal, 1:3 zoom ratio
youtube_shorts.typical_use: Recipe tutorials, taste test reactions, behind-the-scenes production
